zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Harley於1250年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親Sir Robert de Harley26歲，母親Alice de Pyvlesdon25歲。她於1270年與Richard De La Bere在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1305年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根高維爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Harley于1250年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Harley26岁，母亲Alice de Pyvlesdon25岁。她于1270年与Richard De La Bere在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1305年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根高維爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Harley (Shropshire, Yorkshire). The Shropshire placename derives from Old English hær ‘rock, heap of stones’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Yorkshire placename derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ or hær + hlāw ‘mound, hill’, later replaced by lēah.

Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarghaile ‘descendant of Earghal’, a variant of the personal name Fearghal without the initial F-. This name has also become Herley and Hurley . Compare Arrell and Harrell .
Scottish (Fife): habitational name from any of several places called Harlaw in Midlothian, Peeblesshire, and Berwickshire, named in Older Scots with hare ‘gray’ + law ‘hill’.

variants.name: Herley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Art, Cormac.
Irish: variant of   Hurley  , probably via   Herlihy  .
English: variant of   Harley   or   Hurley  .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Harley was born in 1250, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Harley, was 26 and her mother, Alice de Pyvlesdon, was 25. She married Richard De La Bere in 1270, in England, United Kingdom. She died in 1305, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Harley est née en 1250, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Harley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice de Pyvlesdon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De La Bere en 1270, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1305, à Gower, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Harley 1250 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Harley 26 und ihre Mutter Alice de Pyvlesdon 25. Sie hat 1270 in England, United Kingdom Richard De La Bere geheiratet. Sie starb 1305 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Harley(이)가 1250년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Harley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Pyvlesdon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard De La Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Harley родилась в 1250 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Harley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Pyvlesdon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De La Bere в 1270 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1305 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl Harley nació en 1250, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Harley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice de Pyvlesdon, tenía 25 años.
